source_notes: CS2 weapon-only rare paint-seed patterns for query-by-seed marketplace lookup. Knives and gloves excluded. Families: case-hardened (blue-gem seed tiers; AK-47/Five-SeveN/MAC-10 Case Hardened + Desert Eagle Heat Treated, the Armory-2024 case-hardened variant, incl. gold/purple variant seeds), fade (% computed from seed via Valve algorithm; high_fade_seeds = all seeds >=90%, method fade-calc), art-position (Galil Phoenix Blacklight). Sources: cs-tierlist (GODrums) generated JSON, csgobluegem.com / csgoskins.gg / sellyourskins / isitabluegem seed tables, npm csgo-fade-percentage-calculator v2.0.0. Re-swept for other weapon seed-overpay finishes: csgobluegem master blue-gem list confirms no weapon Case-Hardened/Heat-Treated beyond the four here; Hyper Beast/Asiimov-type skins excluded (seed irrelevant).

skins.name: MAC-10 | Case Hardened
skins.note: T1/T2 enumerated; lower tiers exist on csgobluegem.com but not fully listed in source

skins.name: Desert Eagle | Heat Treated
skins.note: Armory 2024 Classified blue-gem skin (case-hardened look under 'Heat Treated' name). Blue gems = bright-blue body; also collectible gold and purple pattern variants. #1=490, #2-tier=148/69/704.
skins.source: csgobluegem.com/desert-eagle-heat-treated-best-rare-blue-pattern (primary, tiered blue/gold/purple seed lists); cross-checked skin.land/blog/full-deagle-heat-treated-patterns-guide + pricempire/cs.money/skinport/hotspawn (rank #1=490, then 148/69/704)

skins.name: AWP | Fade
skins.note: Fade % computed at runtime from paint seed via csgo-fade-percentage-calculator. SM scan-and-detect: compute exact %, flag >= flag_min_pct, show the %. PS/CS.Money query-by-seed: query the >= query_min_pct seed list, generated from the lib at build time. max_pct_seed = the 100%/Absolute Max seed(s).
